nodes.name: Fetch Brand Site
nodes.notes: Fetches the PowerPlug homepage to extract current branding, logo URL, navigation structure, and contact page URL.

nodes.name: Extract Brand Intelligence
nodes.notes: Parses the brand site HTML to extract logo URL, contact URL, and validates brand assets.

nodes.name: Prepare Prompt Context
nodes.notes: Merges webhook input (topic, keyword, word count, image URLs) with extracted brand intelligence.

nodes.name: Generate Article (AI)
nodes.notes: Generates the full HTML article using the v3 system prompt and brand context.

nodes.name: Validate & Sanitize Output
nodes.notes: v3.0 validation: checks logo, TOC numeric prefixes, H1 count, content blocks, date in hero, floating button position, brand colors, and auto-fixes sentice references.

nodes.name: Load System Prompt
nodes.notes: v3.0 dynamic prompt builder — embeds the full v3 ruleset including content block rules, TOC prefix rules, and floating button logic.

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes: Returns the generated HTML and v3.0 validation report to the webhook caller.
